title.zh: 小迈阿密河畔的直立蛙形怪
title.en: The Upright Frog of the Little Miami River

summary.zh: 俄亥俄州洛夫兰镇的蛙面直立小怪物：1955年有商人称见到三只，1972年两名警察先后目击；后一位目击警察多年后改口称那只是一只大蜥蜴。
summary.en: A frog-faced biped of Loveland, Ohio: a businessman reported three in 1955, and two police officers saw one in 1972 — though one officer later said it was just a large iguana.

description.zh:
洛夫兰蛙人身高一米上下，皮肤湿滑起皱如蛙皮，面部是蛙或蜥蜴的模样，用两条后腿直立行走，出没于俄亥俄州辛辛那提东北洛夫兰镇的小迈阿密河沿岸。最早的故事可追溯到1955年5月：一名途经的商人声称在路边看到三个蛙面小人聚在一起，其中一个举着一根冒出火花的短棒——这个细节让早期UFO作家把它归入「接触事件」。

最有分量的目击发生在1972年3月3日凌晨：洛夫兰警官雷·肖基驾车沿河巡逻时，车灯照见路面上一个蹲伏的生物，它站起身来，翻过护栏下到小迈阿密河去。肖基描述它约一米高、皮革质感的皮肤、蛙一样的脸。两周后，另一名警官马克·马修斯也在河边路面遇到类似生物，开枪射击未中。两名警察的报告让「蛙人」登上地方报纸，成为俄亥俄州最著名的小怪物。多年后马修斯改口：那只是一只逃逸或冻僵的大鬣蜥，缺了尾巴才显得像直立的蛙——两位当事人的说法至今不完全一致。

蛙人在网络时代意外翻红：2016年8月，一名玩《宝可梦GO》的青年声称在洛夫兰湖边拍到发光眼睛的蛙形身影，视频疯传；同年辛辛那提还上演了以蛙人为主角的音乐剧《Hot Damn! It's the Loveland Frog!》。小镇顺势把蛙人做成吉祥物，河畔立起了弹班卓琴的蛙人雕像。
description.en:
The Loveland Frogman stands about a meter tall, with slick, wrinkled froglike skin and a frog's or lizard's face, walking upright on its hind legs along the Little Miami River at Loveland, northeast of Cincinnati, Ohio. The earliest story dates to May 1955, when a traveling businessman claimed he saw three small frog-faced figures gathered by the road, one holding a short rod that sprayed sparks — a detail that led early UFO writers to file the case among "contact" reports.

The weightiest sightings came in 1972. In the early hours of March 3, Loveland police officer Ray Shockey caught a crouched creature in his headlights; it stood, climbed over the guardrail, and went down the bank into the Little Miami. Shockey described it as about a meter tall with leathery skin and a frog's face. Two weeks later officer Mark Matthews encountered a similar animal on the river road and fired at it without effect. The two police reports put the Frogman in the local papers and made it Ohio's most famous small monster. Years later Matthews revised his account: the thing had been a large escaped iguana, tailless and therefore oddly upright — and the two officers' versions have never fully agreed since.

The internet gave the Frogman a second life. In August 2016 a young man playing Pokemon Go said he filmed a frog-shaped figure with glowing eyes at Lake Isabella near Loveland, and the video went viral; that same year Cincinnati staged the musical Hot Damn! It's the Loveland Frog! The town has embraced its mascot, complete with a riverside statue of a banjo-playing frogman.

value.zh: 1972年3月警官肖基与马修斯先后目击
马修斯后称目标是一只大鬣蜥
value.en: Matthews later said it was a large iguana
A 2016 Pokemon Go player's viral video

sources.zh: 1972年3月洛夫兰警方报告与地方报纸报道
sources.en: Loveland police reports and local press coverage, March 1972

sources.zh: 洛伦·科尔曼《神秘美国》中的案例记述（1983）
sources.en: Case account in Loren Coleman, Mysterious America (1983)

label.zh: 俄亥俄州洛夫兰镇小迈阿密河
label.en: Little Miami River at Loveland, Ohio
